form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.60) when sixth over 320m at Richmond in a Grade 3/4. Has two successes and two minors from eight starts from box 1. Leading player.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (22.45) at this track. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 388m. Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 4/5 on April 10 over 400m at The Gardens behind Stop It Zipper beaten a neck (23.06). Racing well and can find winning form again.
